publicLaunchScope: Hosted web app and PWA first. Native Android AAB is not required unless BIN GROUP decides to publish a Play Store build.

hosting.proof: Firebase deploy completed for bin-group-57c60 hosting and bin-group-admin-panel hosting on 2026-06-10.

functionsDeploy.proof: Firebase deploy updated production functions including runSovereignAI(europe-west3), payment, ticket, HR, notification, and passport functions on 2026-06-10.

firebaseAuth.proofRequired: Fresh production proof for admin, owner, tenant, technician, and broker login on live Firebase Auth. Attach run date, tester, role, device, and screenshots/log references.
firebaseAuth.proof: Tested owner, tenant, technician, broker, and admin login on live production by Rashid Bin Abdul Ghani on 2026-06-20.

firestoreRules.proof: Security rules emulator tests were previously reported passing. Re-run before public launch after every rules change.

storageRules.proofRequired: Fresh upload/download/delete permission test for tenant issue photos, technician before/after photos, contracts, invoices, and admin evidence access.

firebaseFunctionsLiveSmoke.proofRequired: Fresh production callable/trigger test for owner payment, ticket dispatch, SLA checks, HR sync, notifications, and Sovereign AI. Deployment alone is not enough for this gate.

firebaseCloudMessaging.proofRequired: Real Android/iOS/PWA push notification delivery test with token registration, foreground/background delivery, and disabled-permission fallback.

googleMaps.proofRequired: Real mobile GPS permission, map render, technician check-in, arrival tracking, and location-denied fallback test.

aiVisionOrTriage.proofRequired: Production runSovereignAI callable must be tested with a signed-in user. Confirm server-side secrets/fallback behavior and no client-exposed AI keys.

paymentGatewayOrManualBank.proofRequired: Live owner contract -> 15% mobilization/manual bank/admin verification -> dashboard unlock path, including rejection path.

whatsappBusiness.proofRequired: Optional: business verification, approved templates, opt-in, send logs.

smsVoiceFallback.proofRequired: Optional: carrier approval, cost control, emergency fallback test.

uaeDataResidencyPosition.proofRequired: Document data categories, subprocessors, hosting region, retention policy, and owner/tenant privacy wording before public launch.

firebaseBillingPlan.proofRequired: Confirm in Firebase Console -> Project Settings -> Usage and billing that the production project is on the Blaze (pay-as-you-go) plan, not Spark. Spark blocks all outbound networking from Cloud Functions, which silently breaks Stripe (functions/stripePayment.ts), Twilio SMS (functions/index.ts), WhatsApp/Meta Graph API (functions/whatsappWebhook.ts), OpenAI, and Gemini calls even though deployment itself succeeds on Spark.

appCheckEnforcement.proofRequired: App Check is initialized client-side (src/lib/firebase.ts, apps/admin-panel/src/lib/firebase.ts) behind VITE_ENABLE_FIREBASE_APPCHECK, but firestore.rules and storage.rules contain no request.app checks and no callable Function checks context.app/request.app, so a valid token is never verified server-side. Before enforcing, confirm in Firebase Console -> App Check -> Apps that verified-token traffic is consistently high for every client surface (main app, owner-app, admin-panel), then enable enforcement for Firestore, Storage, and callable/HTTP Functions.

androidPwaSmoke.proofRequired: Real Android phone PWA test across all five dashboards.

iosPwaSmoke.proofRequired: Real iPhone/Safari PWA test across all five dashboards.

technicianGpsTracking.proofRequired: Real technician GPS check-in and live tracking test.

pushNotifications.proofRequired: Real push notification delivery and fallback test.

pdfMobileDownload.proofRequired: Arabic/English contract, invoice, lease, and report PDF mobile download/open test.

arabicRtlAllCoreScreens.proofRequired: Arabic RTL sweep for owner, tenant, technician, broker, admin, modals, toasts, empty states, and PDFs.

everyButtonWritesFirestoreOrStorage.proofRequired: Button-by-button audit proving each action writes, reads, navigates, or fails safely.

logoutAllDashboards.proofRequired: Logout test in owner, tenant, technician, broker, and admin shells on desktop and mobile.

waiver.riskNote: BIN GROUP public launch scope is hosted web/PWA first. Native Android Play Store AAB is outside the current launch scope.

allowedWaiverFormat.riskNote: Explicit operational risk accepted for pilot only
